01 — Architecture

Five-Layer Pipeline

Raw CSV to live API in five clean, testable stages. Zero data leakage enforced at every step.

API
INGESTION LAYER — preprocessing.py
▶ python src/preprocessing.py Loading raw data from data/sales_data.csv Loaded 8,084 rows × 4 columns Parsing dates … (mixed formats: M/D/YYYY and DD-MM-YYYY) After cleaning: 8,084 rows, 43 states, range 2019-01-12 → 2023-12-03 Monthly panel built: 2,580 rows, 43 states, 60 months ✔ Train: 2,322 rows │ Val: 258 rows │ ZERO data leakage
02 — Models

Four Algorithms Compared

Each model is trained and validated independently per state. The best MAPE wins.

SARIMA statsmodels
Seasonal AutoRegressive Integrated Moving Average with automatic AIC-based order selection via grid search. Uses ADF test for differencing order.
Order searchp,q ∈ {0,1,2}
SeasonalP,D,Q ∈ {0,1}, m=12
States won7 / 43
Prophet facebook
Additive/multiplicative decomposition model with automatic changepoint detection and US federal holiday regressors.
Seasonalitymultiplicative
HolidaysUS federal
Changepoint prior0.05
XGBoost recursive
Gradient-boosted trees with 14-feature engineered matrix. Recursive walk-forward multi-step prediction — each output fed back as next input.
Trees / depth300 / 4
RegularisationL1=0.1, L2=1.0
States won36 / 43 ★
LSTM tensorflow
Deep recurrent network with 12-month lookback window. Huber loss for outlier robustness. Early stopping on internal validation split.
ArchitectureLSTM(64)→Dense(32)→1
Loss / OptimHuber / Adam
Early stoppingpatience=15
